'''Mal Hyb''' was a [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]]. She was one of [[Barada/Legends|Barada's]] assistants in the garage of [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]], and was particularly noted for her superior welding skill. She was also a good fighter; her fighting ability often surprised her opponents, since as a [[Human/Legends|Human]] she was considerably smaller than many other residents of the palace.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=The Great God Quay: The Tale of Barada and the Weequays|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}} {{1st}}
